data.title: 国际服专辑「Tomodachi OneStep」发行
data.summary: ['Tomodachi OneStep' Digital Soundtrack Release Notice] Antique Seraphim’s debut song, 'Tomodachi On
data.body:
['Tomodachi OneStep' Digital Soundtrack Release Notice] 

Antique Seraphim’s debut song, 'Tomodachi OneStep', which served as the grand finale of the Serenade Promenade event story, is now available as a digital single—complete with its official music video!~

➡️Details:https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2840529

#BlueArchive
